(1) इन िनयम犘 का संि楹瀉त नाम कंपनी (लेखा परी楹ा और लेखा परी楹क) संशोधन िनयम, 2014 है। (2) ये िनयम राजप灴 म犆 灹काशन क琉 तारीख से 灹वृ瀄त ह犘गे। 2. कंपनी (लेखा परी楹ा और लेखा परी楹क) िनयम, 2014 के िनयम 10 के प瀙चात् िन瀓निलिखत अंत:瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त् :— “10क. धारा 143 क琉 उप-धारा (3) के खंड (i) के 灹योजन犘 के िलए 1 अ灹ैल, 2015 को या उसके प瀙चात 灹ारंभ होने वाले िव瀄तीय वष猀 के िलए लेखापरी楹क क琉 琇रपोट榁 म犆 पया榁玅 आंत琇रक िव牵ीय िनयं灴ण 灹णाली और उसके 灹चालन 灹भावका琇रता के संबंध म犆 कथन होगा: परंतु 琈कसी कंपनी का लेखापरी楹क 1 अ灹ैल, 2014 को या उसके प瀙चात 灹ारंभ होने वाले और 31 माच榁, 2015 को या उससे पूव榁 समा玅 होने वाले िव瀄तीय वष榁 के िलए इस िनयम म犆 िन琖द玗 िववरण 瀡वे榔छा से सि瀓मिलत कर सकेगी।” [फा.सं. 1/33/2013-सीएल-V-भाग] अमरदीप 琐सह भा琇टया, संयु榉त सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पण ण ण ण :::: मूल अिधसूचना सा.का.िन. 246(अ), तारीख 31/3/2014 獧ारा भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग-II, खंड 3, उप-खंड (i) म犆 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th October, 2014 G.S.R. 722(E).—In exercise of powers conferred by sub-sections (1), (2) and (4) of Section 139, sub-sections (1) and (2) of Section 140, sub-section (3) of Section 141, sub-sections (2), (3), (8) and (12) of Section 143, sub-section (3) of Section 148 read with sub-sections (1) and (2) of Section 469 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Companies (Audit and Auditors) Rules, 2014, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Companies (Audit and Auditors) Amendment Rules, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Companies (Audit and Auditors) Rules, 2014, after rule 10, the following shall be inserted, namely:— “10A. For the purposes of clause (i) of sub-section (3) of section 143, for the financial years commencing on or after 1st April, 2015, the report of the auditor shall state about existence of adequate internal financial controls system and its operating effectiveness: Provided that auditor of a company may voluntarily include the statement referred to in this rule for the financial year commencing on or after 1st April, 2014 and ending on or before 31st March, 2015.” [F. No. 1/33/2013-CL-V-Part] AMARDEEP SINGH BHATIA, Jt. Secy. Note.—The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R. 246(E), dated the 31st March, 2014.
